patterns.signature: FoundationDB transaction timeout during TSO leader-election (fdb_error=<N>)
CAS operation failed: commit_ts unavailable, FoundationDB transaction timed out
CnchLock acquire timed out after <N>ms (upstream olapdb-tso commit_ts unavailable)
TransactionCoordinator commit failed: could not obtain commit timestamp
Admin API HTTP 5xx: 500 downstream stream-taskmanager unavailable

note: platform-api has the highest raw count (1900) and stream-taskmanager is what PAGED (FlinkJobUnhealthy). But olapdb-tso's FoundationDB-timeout pattern has the EARLIEST first_seen (09:12:40), minutes before the ingestor (09:14:55), the Flink job (09:17:55) and platform-api (09:20:05). first_seen + the dependency direction reveal olapdb-tso as the origin.
